free_text: Measured ratio of radiative capture and fission cross
sections of U235 and Pu239 in the resonance region
These are monitors for fission cross-sections for
U-235 and Pu-239, respectively. Measured CS are given
For random coincidences in recording of fissions.
for U-235 from 2% to 20%, for Pu-239 from 15% to 30%.
For contribution from contaminating isotope U-235, Pu-2
M.M. Articles were checked. BIB information
Update for current rules and dictionaries.

Ngamma and Nfis - number of counts for gamma and
EPSfis and EPScap - fission and capture detection
K - constant determined from normalization at thermal
energy to known value of ALPHA = 0.174+-0.001
For contribution from contaminating isotope U-235.
